replies.msg:
香港金總要人呀！

記住加入香港金融業職工總會做會員呀！

我哋可唔可以為大家發聲，可以做到咩地步，全靠會員的支持

冇會員，政府點解要理你呢，資方點解要理你呢...

所以唔好等，今日就加入啦

PS: 就算唔係金融界的同業，都麻煩like and share，俾多一個人睇到，就多一分機會團結同路人，拜托拜托🙏

replies.msg:
To my wife: You're gorgeous cute and pretty. You are the best thing that has ever happened to me. Your love is what keeps me going every day. It's awesome to spend my life with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you while you were sleeping but it came back early! So I asked why? It said that angels do not watch over angels. This afternoon I went to the hospital and got an x-ray, do you know what they found? You in my heart. The doctor said my heart will always be fine with you in it.
All I want for Christmas is you. You melt me faster than a snowflake.

Casey
